name: Fast Cash
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations across the U.S., Latin America, and the UK, offering pawn loans secured by personal property and retail merchandise sales.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop chain with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers through traditional pawn lending and retail merchandise operations. FirstCash maintains a significant presence across 29 U.S. states and the District of Columbia, as well as international operations in the United Kingdom, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador, employing approximately 22,000 people worldwide.

The company's primary service is offering non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, meaning borrowers are not personally liable if they cannot repay the loan—the pawn shop simply retains the collateral. Beyond lending, FirstCash operates retail locations that buy and sell jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments, and general merchandise. The company also offers layaway services with 10% down payment options, gold and precious metal buying services, and operates a subsidiary (AFF) providing lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through over 15,000 merchant partners nationwide.

FirstCash's scale and established brand differentiate it as a market leader in the pawn industry. The company is listed on both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating institutional credibility. With over 2,500 stores and a sophisticated inventory system accessible online, FirstCash offers convenience and product variety that independent pawn shops cannot match. Their technology-driven approach to point-of-sale payments and retail finance positions them as a modernized alternative to traditional pawn operations.

However, pawn loans are fundamentally high-cost borrowing products. While advertised as non-recourse (reducing borrower default risk), they require giving up personal property and involve implicit interest rates that, while typically lower than payday loans, are substantially higher than traditional bank lending. Borrowers must carefully assess whether the convenience of immediate cash justifies losing valuable items. The focus on serving credit-constrained consumers means this product fills a genuine gap for those without access to traditional credit, but it should be viewed as a last-resort option.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador provide extensive accessibility
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no personal liability if unable to repay—collateral is retained instead
Immediate cash on the spot for items sold or pawned without credit check or approval delays
Wide variety of accepted collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods) vs. limited options at other lenders
Listed on S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indices, indicating institutional scale and regulatory oversight
Layaway services available with only 10% down payment for customers wanting to purchase without immediate full payment
Over 15,000 merchant partner network through AFF subsidiary for lease-to-own and retail finance options
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering physical personal property as collateral, with loss of item if unable to repay
Implicit interest rates on pawn loans, while lower than payday loans, are substantially higher than traditional bank loans
Limited to borrowers with valuable physical items to pledge; does not help those without collateral
Retail merchandise inventory quality and selection varies by location and depends on what customers pawn
No mention of APR transparency, repayment terms, or fee structures on the public website
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers with valuable personal items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) needing immediate funds without credit checks
People seeking to avoid debt while borrowing, as non-recourse structure means no ongoing obligation after item surrender
Individuals in financial emergencies needing fast liquidity without traditional loan approval timelines
Budget-conscious shoppers looking to purchase items through layaway or lease-to-own arrangements
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with valuable personal items who need immediate funds without credit checks or traditional loan approval. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral and carry higher-than-bank interest rates, making this a high-cost borrowing option suitable only as a last resort when traditional lending is unavailable.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (non-recourse)
Purchase and cash payment for jewelry, gold, silver, and precious metals
Retail sales of used and new merchandise (electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Layaway purchase plans with 10% down payment
Gold and precious metal buying services
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Online store locator and inventory search system
Non-recourse lending (no personal liability on unpaid loans)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
